description: Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:--------------------------------------------------------------------The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.Cast:---------Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal GadaDisha Vakani as Daya Jethalal GadaRaj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal GadaShailesh Lodha as Taarak MehtaNeha Mehta as Anjali Taarak MehtaTanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam IyerMunmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan IyerMandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram BhideSonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram BhideNidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) Gurucharan Singh as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh SodhiJennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh SodhiKavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj HathiKush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)Shyam Pathak as Popatlal PandeySharad Sankla as AbdulAzhar Shaikh as Pinku Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak MehtaSet Design: Jayant DeshmukhCreative Consultant: Dayashankar PandeyOn-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAPCostume Designer: Alka MehtaCostume Stylist: Ekta BrahmbhattSound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri Cameraman: Aamir ViraniProduction Head: Arvind MarchandeProduction Controler: Vinod ShishupalBackground Music: Sunil PatniOnline Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh BajajEditor: Dinesh GosaviCreative Supervision ( Post Production): Krunal KhakhkharProgramming Team: Vinod Rao, Leanne DemeloProject Head: Sohil RamaniWritten By: Ashok ParmarDirectors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh RajdaTelevision Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr ModiMore Useful Links : * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/tmkoc.sabtv* Follow us on Instagram : http://www.instagram.com/tmkoc_ntf * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/tmkoc_ntf* Visit us at : http://www.tmkoc.com#tmkoc #taarakmehta #tmkocsmileofindia

title: बेकिंग पावडर, सोडा, दही न घालता बनवा डॉल केक | नोझल ची गरज नाही | Doll Cake from scratch | Madhura
tags: Madhurasrecipe|Marathi Recipe|Maharashtrian Recipes|Marathi Padarth|Maharashtrian Padarth|Doll cake recipe in marathi|doll cake tutorial|doll cake decorating ideas|doll cake recipe with out oven|doll cake design ideas|doll cake making recipe|doll cake icing|barbie doll cake|how to make doll cake at home|easy and quick doll cake decoration idea|barbie doll cake decorating ideas|bahulicha cake|quick princess cake design|doll cake recipe in marathi|cake
description: डॉल केक बनवण्यासाठी लागणारे साहित्य • १ १/२ कप दूध • १ कप पिठीसाखर • ३~४ थेंब व्हॅनिला इसेन्स • ३/४ कप तेल • ३ कप मैदा • २ कप हेवी व्हिपिंग क्रिम • २~३ थेंब व्हॅनिला इसेन्स• १/२ कप पाणी • ३~४ चमचे साखर • खायचा लाल रंग • थोडेसे रंगीत स्प्रिंकल्स• थोडेसे सिल्व्हर बॉल्सPlease take a moment to like and subscribe ✿◕ ‿ ◕✿http://www.youtube.com/c/MadhurasRecipeMarathi?sub_confirmation=1मधुराजरेसिपी चे मसाले ऑर्डर करण्यासाठी इथे क्लीक करा - https://amzn.to/2Cq0jz4किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा  #EasyDollCake #DollCakeTutorial #NoPipingBag #NoNozzle--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Click for detail Recipe - http://www.madhurasrecipe.com/regional-recipe/marathi-video-recipesIngredients:• 1 1/2 cup Milk• 1 cup powdered Sugar• 3~4 drops Vanilla essence• 3/4 cup Oil• 3 cups Maida• 1 1/2 tsp Eno fruit salt• 1/2 tsp Milk• 2 cups Heavy whipping cream• 2~3 drops Vanilla essence• 1/2 cup Water• 3~4 tsp Sugar• Red food color• Few colored Sprinkles • Few Silver ballsMethod:• Take milk in a bowl and add powdered sugar, vanilla essence, oil.• Mix everything well together. • Sieve maida into the mixture and mix well.• Add Eno fruit salt, milk and mix well quickly. • I have taken 6” tray and a glass bowl that fits perfectly on it. • You can use steel or aluminium bowl in place of glass bowl. • You can use store bought mould that is specially designed for doll cake. • Line up the tray with butter paper and pour half batter into it.• Line up the base of bowl with cutter paper and pour out the remaining batter into it. • Tap the tray & bowl really good. • Give a layer of salt at the base of the cooker and place an empty tin. • Remove the rubber ring and whistle form the lid and preheat the cooker on medium heat for   about 5-7 minutes. • Place the baking on the empty pot in the cooker and bake the cake on medium heat for about   25-30 minutes. • You can follow the same procedure if you want to bake the cake in kadhai. • You can bake the cake in oven at 180 Deg C for about 30-35 minutes. • Take heavy whipping cream into a bowl. • Transfer the bowl in deep freezer for 30 minutes. • Beat the cream on low speed for about 2-3 minutes. • Beat on high speed for about 3-4 minutes until it forms stiff peaks. • Add vanilla essence and mix well. Cream is ready. • Loosen the edges and flip the cake over into a dish. • Wrap the base of cake well with plastic paper or cling wrap and transfer it into freeze for at   least 30 minutes. • Take the cake out, remove the wrap and cut it horizontally into 2 pieces. • Repeat the same process to cut the dome shape cake into 3 layers. • Take a card board and paste silver or any colored paper on it.• Spread a little cream at the center of the card board. • Place the round base of the cake first. • Cover each corner of the card board with butter paper so that cream won’t fall on it while   decorating.• Spread sugar syrup on the cake. • Add the chipped cream and spread it evenly. • Place another layer of cake and sprinkle sugar syrup on it.  • Add cream and spread it evenly. • Place the base layer of dome cake on it and again sprinkle sugar syrup. • Add whipped cream and spread it evenly. • Place second layer of dome shape cake and sprinkle sugar syrup. • Add whipped cream and spread it evenly. • Place the final top layer of dome shape cake and sprinkle sugar syrup. • Coat all sides evenly with whipping cream. • Transfer the cake into freeze for at least 30 minutes to set. • Give another layer of whipping cream spread it evenly. • While smoothing the cream layer after every 3-4 uses of spatula dip it in warm water and wipe   it out. • So that smoothing will be easier and perfect. • Wrap the lower portion of the doll with plastic sheet or cling wrap. • Make an insertion at center of the cake with a knife to make a clear opening for inserting doll. • Insert the doll up to her waist carefully into the opening of the cake. • Fill up the piping bag with whipping cream. • You can use any plastic bag in place of piping bag. • Add a little red food color in the left over cream and mix well to make pink cream. • Transfer the pink cream into a piping bag. • Decorate the upper portion of the doll with pick and white whipped cream to make her dress. • Make a neck lace around the neck of the doll with pink cream. • Make a few partitions on her dress for decorating it with a tooth pick.• Cut the end of piping bag a little and decorate one partition with pick cream.• In this way decorate the doll alternate with white and pick cream. • Make a small belt around the waist of the doll with pink cream. • Decorate the doll with colourful sprinkles. This is optional. You can skip it if you want.• Remove the butter paper that we placed in all four corners before decorating the doll. • Doll cake is all ready.

title: കനത്ത വെള്ളപ്പൊക്കത്തിന് ഇടയിൽ കിട്ടിയ അതിഥി | Catching Cobra During Flood In Kerala 2020 | Kottayam
tags: [None]
description: (09/08/2020) കോട്ടയം ജില്ലയിലെ ചുങ്കത്ത് നിന്നും രാവിലെ ഒരു വ്യക്തി വിളിക്കുകയുണ്ടായി. കനത്ത മഴയും വെള്ളപ്പൊക്കവും കാരണം ആകെ ദുരിതത്തിൽ ആണെന്നും അതിന്റെ ഇടയിൽ പാമ്പുകളുടെ ശല്യവും ഉണ്ടെന്നു പറയുകയുണ്ടായി. അതിൽ ഒരു പാമ്പ് തന്റെ വീട്ടിൽ അകപെട്ടെന്നും അതിൽ നിന്നും രക്ഷപെടുത്തണമെന്നും പറഞ്ഞു.വീടിന്റെ പകുതിയോളം വെള്ളം കയറിയതിനാൽ ഒന്നും ചെയ്യാൻ പറ്റാത്ത അവസ്ഥയാണ്. ഉച്ചയോടെ ഞാൻ തിരുവനന്തപുരത്തു നിന്ന് കോട്ടയം ചുങ്കത്ത് എത്തുകയും അവിടെ നിന്നും കുറച്ചു ദൂരം വള്ളത്തിൽ കയറി പാമ്പ് അകപ്പെട്ട വീട്ടിലേയ്ക്ക് പോകുകയും അകപ്പെട്ട പാമ്പിനെ സുരക്ഷിതമായി രക്ഷിക്കുകയും ചെയ്തു.     ഈ ദൗത്യം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞതിൽ ഒരുപാട് സന്തോഷമുണ്ട്.

title: कौन है ये बिनोद| who is binod and why his memes are viral
tags: viral trend|who is binod|shuru binod is viral|binod memes|binod meme|binod op|indian popular code|animesh mukharjee|binod comment|binod tharu|binod kon hai|slayy point|slayy point binod
description: Binod memes started when Indian Youtuber Abhyudaya Mohan uploaded a video “Why Indian Comments Section is Garbage” on Slayy Point. In the video, he showed what the Indian Internet community posts in the comment section of Youtube videos. One of the screenshots from the video which went viral is a Youtube user “Binod Tharu” who just wrote Binod as a comment in a youtube video. Soon, social media users started posting “Binod” comments on all Youtubers live streams which started the trend of Binod
